issues.description: Section 1 (Introduction) exists as a heading but contains zero words and no content blocks. The document begins with an Abstract but lacks any introductory content to establish context, scope, objectives, or structure of the review. Readers have no guidance on what to expect or why the topic matters.
issues.action_details: Generate substantive introduction content in sec_ad4841dbf6b2 that: (1) establishes the importance and context of the test topic, (2) states the scope and objectives of the review, (3) previews the main sections and what they will cover, (4) provides necessary background for understanding subsequent sections. Should be 150-250 words.

issues.description: Section 5 (Discussion) is completely empty with zero words and no content blocks. This is where cross-cutting themes, synthesis across sections 3 and 4, implications, and limitations should be discussed. Without this, the document jumps directly from specific topics to conclusions without any integrative analysis.
issues.action_details: Generate comprehensive discussion content in sec_b54812a3938d that: (1) synthesizes findings from sections 3 and 4, identifying patterns and connections, (2) discusses implications of the findings, (3) addresses limitations of current research, (4) provides broader context for the conclusions. Should be 200-300 words.

issues.description: Section 6 (Conclusions) contains only 20 words total across two subsections with minimal content. The 'Key Findings' subsection (blk_36dae8aae0d7) is only 10 words and extremely vague ('several important conclusions'). The conclusions should synthesize the entire review but instead provide placeholder-level content that doesn't actually conclude anything meaningful.
issues.action_details: Expand content in sec_c8651428e9aa subsections to provide: (1) concrete summary of key findings from the review (not vague statements), (2) clear statement of what has been established, (3) implications for the field, (4) concrete recommendations for future research based on identified gaps. Expand to 150-200 words minimum with substantive content.

issues.description: Section 2 (Methodology) is completely empty with zero words. For a review article, methodology should explain how sources were identified, selected, and analyzed. This absence leaves readers with no understanding of how the review was conducted or what criteria were used.
issues.action_details: Generate methodology content in sec_5721579cefba explaining: (1) how sources were identified and selected, (2) inclusion/exclusion criteria, (3) analytical approach used to synthesize findings, (4) scope and boundaries of the review. Should be 100-150 words appropriate for a review article methodology.

issues.description: Both section 3.3 (blk_d665311478b3) and section 4.3 (blk_d488abf1276e) end their respective topic sections with nearly identical 'Outstanding Questions' or 'Future Directions' framing. Both use similar language about gaps in knowledge and future research needs. This creates redundant structural elements that should be consolidated into a single future directions discussion.
issues.action_details: Consolidate the future directions content from both blk_d665311478b3 and blk_d488abf1276e into a single 'Future Directions' subsection within the Discussion (sec_b54812a3938d) or as part of the Conclusions. Remove or reduce these subsections to brief statements of topic-specific gaps, with comprehensive future directions discussed once in an integrated manner.

issues.description: Section 6.1 'Research Themes and Focus Areas' (blk_8b1085bc592a) appears in the Conclusions section but contains content that seems more appropriate for the Introduction. Identifying 'research themes and focus areas' is typically done at the beginning of a document to frame what will be covered, not in the conclusions.
issues.action_details: Move the 'Research Themes and Focus Areas' content from sec_440bf9755b02 to the Introduction (sec_ad4841dbf6b2) where it can properly frame the scope and focus of the review. If kept in conclusions, reframe it as 'Key Thematic Findings' to reflect what was learned rather than what was studied.

issues.description: The document ends abruptly after an extremely brief 'Key Findings' statement (10 words) that provides no actual findings. There is no closing statement, no final synthesis, and no forward-looking perspective. The document simply stops without giving readers closure or a sense of completion.
issues.action_details: Expand the conclusion to provide proper closure: (1) substantive summary of what the review established, (2) statement of significance/implications, (3) clear articulation of what remains to be done, (4) final concluding statement that provides closure. The ending should leave readers with clear takeaways and a sense of completion.

issues.description: The document narrative is broken from the start. After the Abstract, readers encounter two consecutive empty sections (Introduction and Methodology) before reaching any actual content in section 3. This creates a jarring experience where readers expect context and methodological framing but instead jump directly into topic-specific content without preparation.
issues.action_details: Address this by populating both sec_ad4841dbf6b2 and sec_5721579cefba with appropriate content to establish narrative continuity. The Introduction should bridge from the Abstract to the main content, and Methodology should establish the review's approach before diving into findings.

edits.introduction_requirements: Generate substantive introduction content in sec_ad4841dbf6b2 that: (1) establishes the importance and context of the test topic, (2) states the scope and objectives of the review, (3) previews the main sections and what they will cover, (4) provides necessary background for understanding subsequent sections. Should be 150-250 words.

Should be 100-150 words appropriate for a review article methodology.

Expand to 150-200 words minimum with substantive content.

Expand the conclusion to provide proper closure: (1) substantive summary of what the review established, (2) statement of significance/implications, (3) clear articulation of what remains to be done, (4) final concluding statement that provides closure. The ending should leave readers with clear takeaways and a sense of completion.
